questionHtml:
Felix’s data are plotted on the following graph.

Use the plot to comment on the validity of the model in part (a).
markschemeHtml:
the graph is not a straight line / only (approx.) straight for small t, so the model does not appear to be valid                    R1

Note: Award R1 for recognising that the graph is non-linear AND stating that the model does not appear to be valid

[1 mark]

meta.title: Use the plot to comment on the validity of the model in part (a).
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 5.10—Second derivatives, testing for max and min
